name_en: 【Haiyuan Exclusive Real Shot Chip Version】M12465 Monogram Ink Series OnTheGo Small Handbag features a smooth matte calfskin texture, with rivet loops at the corners paying homage to the brand's classic hard-shell trunk design. The neat interior features a large zip pocket for storing bills and tickets. 25 x 19 x 11.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
